104-10183-10037 2025 RELEASE UNDER THE PRESIDENT JOHN F. KENNEDY ASSASSINATION RECORDS ACT OF 1992
18 JUNE 1963 FLE N CS F NC
iro DoF, C1, C/OP5, ci/0A, F1, E S/c
INFO: DDF, CI, CI/OPS, CI/OA, F1, WE 4, S/c
1. ABUEST SHITHAM ASK AMHIP FOR DATE H 8NT LSTTER o l
1. REQUEST SMITHAM ASK AMWHIP FOR DATE HE SENT LETTER TO
''THOPGON'S FRIND'' IN PBRUMEN. ALSO REMIND HIM TO SAVS COPY OF
''THOMPSON'S FRIEND'' IN PBRUMEN. ALSO REMIND HIM TO SAVES COPY OF
LETTER FOR THOPSON. IF AMWHIP ACREEABL, OFFKR SEND COPY T0
LETTER FOR THOMPSON. IF AMWHIP AGREEABLE, OFFER SEND COPY TO
2. FYI, LBTTER IS ACTIVATION EFFORT TO RELUCTANT DRAGON
2. FYI, LETTER IS ACTIVATION EFFORT TO RELUCTANT DRAGON
AGNT NO PBRUSN, HO MET PARIS 8Y THC3PSON AND WALLACE A. GIOWEY
AGENT NOW PBRUMEN, WHO MET PARIS BY THOMPSON AND WALLACE A. GROWERY
LAST BUISR. AGKNT IS GOOD FRIEND AMFHIP WHO WAS INSTRUMENTAL I
LAST SUMMER. AGENT IS GOOD FRIEND AMWHIP WHO WAS INSTRUMENTAL IN
